Generated 2026-06-26T18:00:00Z · window 2026-06-20 → 2026-06-26

Checkout API – Peak: Cross-Run Trend & Regression

5 runs over the release window

Account Acme Performance (1001)Workspace Release Gating (2002)Project Checkout (3003)Test Checkout API – Peak (4004)

Executive Summary

NO-SHIP

p95 latency regressed 28% on the latest run and error rate breached the 1% SLA.

Response-time percentiles were stable for the first four runs, then p95 jumped from 612 ms to 784 ms on 2026-06-26.

Error rate crossed the 1% failure criterion on the final run (1.9%), driven by the /checkout/submit endpoint.

Recommend blocking the release and triaging the latest run before re-testing.
